prompt: /tdd build a user authentication system with registration, login, and password reset

assertions.text: Triggers design gate (Phase 0) for multi-feature spec
Decomposes into 3+ work units with dependency ordering
Each unit goes through full RED→GREEN→3-review cycle
Uses update-state.ts to track each unit's status transitions
Phase 5 runs full test suite (not per-unit)
Calls check-state.ts and generate-report.ts in Phase 6
Uses TeamDelete for cleanup in Phase 7
